authority.fallback: If this file is missing or invalid, fail closed and regenerate it from DESIGN_DOCS before implementation.

intent.one_line_contract: Source + Intent + Policy -> Evidence + Verdict + ActionPlan
intent.phase_rule: Phases are milestone labels; mechanism belongs to the one-line artifact decision contract.

DESIGN_DOCS.role: phase route, stop conditions, and prioritization
layer boundaries and release front door contract

RUN_ROOT.policy: Auxiliary run/audit artifacts use .run namespaces. Release gate evidence remains in target/delivery receipts. Toolchain artifacts must use official toolchain entrypoints and stay bounded, cleanable, and reversible.

must_gate.trigger: run installer or unknown executable payload
must_gate.rule: require explicit gate entry before execution

must_gate.trigger: tag, retag, upload, publish, delete, or mutate a public release
must_gate.rule: manual confirmation required; v0.1.2 remains immutable unless release-repair is explicitly requested
allowed only for repo-native read-only GitHub release verification or clearly declared read-only evidence probes; no publish or mutation

must_gate.trigger: registry, service, scheduled task, PATH, firewall, certificate store, or other machine-level change
destructive deletion outside bounded generated artifacts
must_gate.rule: manual confirmation required; prefer reversible cleanup and receipts

WORKFLOW.quality_beyond_end: Allowed only when external contracts, gates, acceptance criteria, and demand scope remain unchanged; otherwise update DESIGN_DOCS and RELEASE_GATE first.

per_cycle_stop_conditions: fresh RELEASE_GATE receipt is PASS for the claimed slice
evidence is recorded in target/delivery or bounded .run namespace
repo status and changed artifacts are reconciled
